creator: B.Candler@pobox.com
text:
Doh! It was a hardware problem; changing the AT bus speed in the BIOS
from CPUCLK/2 to CPUCLK/4 fixed it. I became suspicious after a 3c509
wouldn't work either (turned out it was reading junk out of the ID
register)

My apologies for the noise generated. Please delete or close this
report.

Thanks,

Brian.
